description:
Colleen Schnettler is a Ruby on Rails developer who worked at ClickFunnels, runs SimpleFileUpload (https://www.simplefileupload.com), and is now launching a technical marketing consulting business. She's one of those builders who tried every AI tool on the market—and when they all fell short, decided to just build her own.

In this episode of Builder Stories, Colleen shows us the voice-note-to-LinkedIn system she built in two days, how she uses the Every Compound Engineering framework to plan and execute features in Claude Code, and why she still manually reviews every feature in the browser before merging. 

👇 **Your Builder Briefing (free)** - Your free, 5-minute read to keep up with the latest tools & workflows for building with AI.
https://buildermethods.com

👇 **Use Agent OS** (free open source):
https://buildermethods.com/agent-os

👇 **Use Design OS** (free open source):
https://buildermethods.com/design-os

👇 **Join Builder Methods Pro** - The membership for professionals (and soon-to-be-pros) for building with AI.  Private discord.  Video training library.  Official support for Agent OS.
https://buildermethods.com/pro

▶️ Related videos:
Claude Code is all you need in 2026: https://youtu.be/0hdFJA-ho3c
Agent OS v3 is here: https://youtu.be/mcxgLB5-eZc

💬 Drop a comment with your questions and requests for upcoming videos!

Chapters:

00:00 Meet Colleen Schnettler
04:29 Voice Note to LinkedIn System
07:21 Compound Engineering Workflow
11:07 Review Process & Multi-Agent Workflow
19:02 3 Takeaways
fulltitle: Build your own marketing tools with Claude Code
